why_it_matters: Android needs a published runtime artifact that can resolve shared playback header groups at admission time instead of forcing repeated per-track auth headers.
user_impact: Android hosts consuming the new native core can register immutable shared header groups, support mixed-token playlists, and keep per-track overrides without cross-track leakage.
upgrade_notes: Upgrade Android native distribution to dev.dgutierrez:legato-android-core:1.1.0 and pair it with the Legato 1.1.0 package line when consuming shared playback headers.
highlights: Admission-time header-group resolution with fail-fast validation.
Per-track headers override shared group headers on Android.
Runtime/request paths keep effective headers internal only.
known_limitations: Static shared headers do not cover dynamic token refresh or DRM workflows.
Process-death restore and broader lifecycle hardening remain separate follow-up work.
